things.name: ARoS Art Museum
things.description: World-class art museum topped by Olafur Eliasson's rainbow panorama walkway

things.name: Den Gamle By (The Old Town)
things.description: Denmark's national open-air museum with 75 historic buildings relocated from across Denmark

things.name: Moesgaard Museum
things.description: Award-winning museum of archaeology and ethnography with the Grauballe Man bog body

things.name: Aarhus Cathedral
things.description: Denmark's longest church, a Gothic masterpiece with remarkable medieval frescoes

things.name: Dokk1
things.description: Striking harbour-front library and citizens' service centre, Denmark's largest public library

things.name: Latin Quarter
things.description: Vibrant neighbourhood of cafes, boutiques and restaurants around the old cathedral school

things.name: Tivoli Friheden
things.description: Charming 19th-century amusement park within the city's beech forest

things.name: Marselisborg Palace & Deer Park
things.description: Summer residence of the Danish royal family with public rose garden and deer park

things.name: Botanical Garden
things.description: The largest botanical garden in Denmark with impressive rock garden and glasshouses

things.name: Risskov Beech Forest
things.description: Ancient beech forest stretching along the Aarhus Bay coastline
